name: @egym/capacitor-nfc-pass-wallet
description: Capacitor plugin for NFC pass wallet integration

scripts.lint:android: if [ "$USE_SYSTEM_ANDROID_SDK" = "1" ]; then cd android && gradle lint; elif command -v devenv >/dev/null 2>&1; then devenv shell -- sh -c 'cd android && gradle lint'; else cd android && gradle lint; fi
scripts.build:android: if [ "$USE_SYSTEM_ANDROID_SDK" = "1" ]; then cd android && gradle assemble; elif command -v devenv >/dev/null 2>&1; then devenv shell -- sh -c 'cd android && gradle assemble'; else cd android && gradle assemble; fi
